=== fixed_bd81-07-12_cb.txt
===================
===================
===================
source: from a Christian Behrand recording

cdr shn > mkw wave > Sonic Foundry edit >shntool >mkw shn



Bob Dylan, 
7/12/81, 
Brondby-Hallen, 
Copenhagen, Denmark

2CDR

(76min+69min), master aud, excellent sound; 

CD1

1 Come On In This House ( ? )

2 It's Gonna Rain Again (C Johnson)

3 Show Me The Way Lord ( ? )

4 Saved By The Grace Of Your Love (Willie Smith/David Palmer)

5 Blowin' In The Wind

6 Gotta Serve Somebody

7 I Believe In You

8 Like A Rolling Stone

9 Till I Get It Right (R Lane/L Henley)

10 Man Gave Names To All The Animals
(slight blip at edit)
11 Maggie's Farm

12 Simple Twist Of Fate

13 Girl Of The North Country

14 Ballad Of A Thin Man

15 Dead Man, Dead Man

16 Walk Around Heaven All Day (Rev J Cleveland/C George)

17 Let's Begin (J Webb)

18 Lenny Bruce



CD2

1 Mr. Tambourine Man

2 Solid Rock

3 Just Like A Woman

4 Watered-Down Love

5 Forever Young

6 All Along The Watchtower

7 Jesus Is The One

8 In The Garden

9 band Intro, Garden Outro, audience to encore
10 Blowin' In The Wind

11 It Ain't Me, Babe

12 Knockin' On Heaven's Door

12 Knockin' On Heaven's Door

===================
=== orignal_bd81-07-12.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/12/81, Brondby-Hallen, Copenhagen, 2CDR

(76min+69min), master aud, excellent sound; 
d2t12 has brief loud talker like radio announcer who introduces song and speaks over part of it near the end


CD1
1 Come On In This House ( ? )

2 It's Gonna Rain Again (C Johnson)
+ Show Me The Way Lord ( ? )
+ Saved By The Grace Of Your Love (Willie Smith/David Palmer)
+ Blowin' In The Wind
+ Gotta Serve Somebody
+ I Believe In You

3,4,5,6,7 Like A Rolling Stone

8 Till I Get It Right (R Lane/L Henley)
+, 9 Man Gave Names To All The Animals

10 Maggie's Farm

11 Simple Twist Of Fate

12 Girl Of The North Country

13 Ballad Of A Thin Man

14 Dead Man, Dead Man
+ Walk Around Heaven All Day (Rev J Cleveland/C George)

15 Let's Begin (J Webb)

16 Lenny Bruce



CD2
1 Mr. Tambourine Man

2 Solid Rock

3 Just Like A Woman

4 Watered-Down Love
5 Forever Young

6 All Along The Watchtower

7 Jesus Is The One

8 In The Garden

9 Blowin' In The Wind

10 It Ain't Me, Babe

11 Knockin' On Heaven's Door

12 Knockin' On Heaven's Door
